4997a26b-e15e-4e11-a1db-c91a31401d18.name: Food & Beverage Manufacturing — Primary Flow
4997a26b-e15e-4e11-a1db-c91a31401d18.summary: The 7-step upstream-to-downstream journey of food from primary production through consumer.

38c95c10-e723-4e66-8812-cd046b01a4c4.name: Supplier Sourcing & Qualification — Nested Flow
38c95c10-e723-4e66-8812-cd046b01a4c4.summary: How a supplier or co-packer goes from candidate to approved, and stays approved.

5169d6c3-cbc2-40d0-9260-95c3f6f03398.name: Inbound Logistics & Receiving — Nested Flow
5169d6c3-cbc2-40d0-9260-95c3f6f03398.summary: From truck arrival at the dock to a material being released or quarantined.

f27048aa-a702-4ccc-9045-959bb39d8afd.name: Raw Material Storage — Nested Flow
f27048aa-a702-4ccc-9045-959bb39d8afd.summary: How received, released materials are held, tracked, and rotated until pulled for production.

90cad837-185d-4f10-b99e-20bda9af4877.name: Formulation & Production Planning — Nested Flow
90cad837-185d-4f10-b99e-20bda9af4877.summary: From demand forecast to a released, allergen-sequenced production schedule.

c4221788-41dd-4111-a69a-2d4b8afac3a9.name: Pre-Production Preparation — Nested Flow
c4221788-41dd-4111-a69a-2d4b8afac3a9.summary: Staging materials at the line immediately before a run starts.

015da854-c2e2-4e69-8ead-a43b4a3a69dc.name: Processing & Production — Nested Flow
015da854-c2e2-4e69-8ead-a43b4a3a69dc.summary: The transformation step itself, plus the CCP monitoring and changeover control that ride alongside it.

a799c4aa-7b95-41b8-9c06-9558f162c9f6.name: In-Process Quality Control — Nested Flow
a799c4aa-7b95-41b8-9c06-9558f162c9f6.summary: Spec-driven sampling and SPC running alongside production, plus nonconformance handling.

99c5a4f4-1b92-4202-8736-d2d44e9ec4fb.name: Packaging — Nested Flow
99c5a4f4-1b92-4202-8736-d2d44e9ec4fb.summary: Fill, seal, catch weight, and primary/secondary packaging verification.

ead7c098-c397-416f-a9a0-d86344b3804b.name: Labeling — Nested Flow
ead7c098-c397-416f-a9a0-d86344b3804b.summary: From label copy draft to a verified, applied label.

0c2b1002-986d-4b83-b2cf-c884adcc302d.name: Finished Goods Storage & Warehousing — Nested Flow
0c2b1002-986d-4b83-b2cf-c884adcc302d.summary: Shelf-life tracking and FEFO management from production output to shipment.

32075fac-92e3-4d58-8966-9eb423536b14.name: Outbound Distribution & Logistics — Nested Flow (traceability events only)
32075fac-92e3-4d58-8966-9eb423536b14.summary: Partial nested flow: only the trace-record-relevant events at the plant boundary, not full logistics management.

fa3dfd0e-f0b2-4d39-8caf-60db1a253cc1.name: Ingredient Sourcing & Procurement — Nested Flow
fa3dfd0e-f0b2-4d39-8caf-60db1a253cc1.summary: From selecting and qualifying a supplier through receiving and storing the material it ships.

88001913-b6d1-4685-862a-f9ef01ba42a9.name: Processing & Manufacturing — Nested Flow
88001913-b6d1-4685-862a-f9ef01ba42a9.summary: From formulation/production planning through in-process quality control during the actual transformation run.

ff5086d9-b478-4a7e-b868-4ed8a0a2d7ec.name: Packaging — Nested Flow
ff5086d9-b478-4a7e-b868-4ed8a0a2d7ec.summary: Fill/seal/pack and labeling as the two steps inside the broader Packaging stage.

87caa949-6840-4213-8110-16df363e1743.name: Distribution — Nested Flow
87caa949-6840-4213-8110-16df363e1743.summary: Finished goods storage and outbound distribution/logistics as the two steps inside the broader Distribution stage.
